approval_policy.cost_control: Generate one asset at a time, validate, then continue.
approval_policy.generation_freeze: Do not call imagegen or Meowa for V3 until the owner approves the V3 reference brief.

shared_style.rendering: refined high-density pixel-informed art; crisp silhouette; not coarse block pixels; no fuzzy edges
shared_style.lighting: soft top-left key light, small warm desk highlights, consistent shadow direction

proportions.head_scale: refined chibi-human with smaller heads than v2; head height target is about 28-32 percent of full seated figure height
proportions.normal_workstation_span: 2x2 source tile, not a 1x1 desk scaled up
proportions.chairman_office_span: 5x5 integer tile office with a clear 2x3 main desk/standing zone

grid.join_edges: Every tile/component must include full left/right/front/back diamond boundary coverage so adjacent pieces can touch without holes, clipped corners, or mismatched shadows.

animation.edge_cleanup_required: Transparent sprites must be matte-cleaned after generation; no white halo around hair, shoulders, hands, chair, or desk.
animation.typing_motion: Typing animation keeps wrists and hands anchored over the keyboard; only fingers make small alternating taps, with optional tiny monitor glow.

negative_prompts: reversed or mirrored monitor content facing away from the seated worker
standalone mismatched chairs next to unrelated desks
one-piece flattened chairman office illustration without a visible 5x5 grid logic
large scaling blur or density mismatch
white halo or chroma-key fringe around hair
arms swinging up and down for typing instead of finger-only motion
blurry or anti-aliased muddy pixel edges

templates.purpose: One unified V3 visual baseline for people, integer-grid tiles, 2x2 workstations, 5x5 chairman office, animation constraints, props, and palette.
templates.projection: all samples use the same 2:1 isometric office camera; no mixed perspective or front-only asset pasted into the sheet
templates.alignment: reference sheet must visibly mark 1x1, 2x2, 2x3, and 5x5 grid relationships so later assets can inherit exact scale and footprint rules
templates.style_notes: unified refined pixel-informed office reference; smaller V3 head scale; complete tile corners; no green screen placeholders; no white matte edge
required_content: chairman character sample with smaller refined head scale
secretary typing sample with hands anchored and finger-only motion notes
worker or specialist sample with monitor facing the worker/viewer correctly
1x1 thick solid carpet tile sample with complete diamond corners
2x2 workstation sample with complete footprint and matched desk-chair-computer set
5x5 chairman office grid preview with visible integer layout and 2x3 main zone
wall or partition sample with grid-aligned anchors
desk/chair/monitor props shown only as references, not loose production pieces
templates.generation_exception: May be created without an existing referenceImage, but must be marked pending until owner approval.

templates.projection: seated at office chair, body and desk facing same 2:1 isometric front-right angle
templates.alignment: chair base sits inside the matching workstation footprint; desk edge parallel to tile edge; character must be generated against the intended desk/chair scale, not pasted onto a separate prop
templates.style_notes: human chibi office character, refined and clear, same head/body ratio across roles, smaller head than v2
templates.scale_policy: Do not upscale official sprites beyond 1.15x source pixels; regenerate at a higher native size if a larger display is needed.
templates.edge_cleanup: No white or light matte halo after transparent-background extraction; hair and hands need clean alpha edges.
templates.animation_motion_policy: For typing, both hands stay on keyboard and only fingers make small alternating taps; wrists, elbows, desk, chair, and camera remain stable.

role_differentiators.secretary: professional suit, both hands resting on keyboard while working, finger-only typing motion
role_differentiators.ceo: formal calm executive, not animal mascot
role_differentiators.supervisor: semi-formal project lead with laptop or tablet
role_differentiators.worker: casual programmer with multi-monitor coding workstation; monitor faces the worker/viewer and is never reversed
role_differentiators.outsourcer: light practical clothes, temporary contractor badge or compact laptop
role_differentiators.edge: specialist with tool cue such as screenshot, repair, or design tablet

required_outputs: working loop webp with visible two-hand typing or tool motion

templates.projection: same 2:1 isometric office view; chairman, boss chair, and desk all aligned
templates.alignment: large chairman office is composed from an exact 5x5 tile grid; executive desk and boss-chair main station occupies a clear 2x3 footprint; walls, sofa, bookshelf, trophy, and window modules align to the same grid; all outer tile corners must be complete

tile_grid_contract.may_be_single_composite_only_if: The composite preserves a visibly integer 5x5 footprint, full edge coverage, and a placement map for every major module.

templates.style_notes: young handsome K-drama domineering executive, clean confident face, black suit, refined not photorealistic; office must read as modular tile art, not one flattened scene pasted over the grid
required_outputs: idle loop seated near high-back chair
working loop reviewing screens or documents
integer 5x5 placement map with the 2x3 main station marked
placement metadata for 2x3 main station and secondary props

templates.projection: 2:1 diamond top face with visible side faces
templates.alignment: tile origin is bottom center; adjacent tiles must touch without gaps at diamond edges

grid_contract.edge_join_policy: All four diamond boundaries must be complete and shareable with adjacent tiles.

templates.style_notes: pure solid charcoal carpet top, subtle texture only if it does not break solid-color read, cyan or warm edge line allowed
required_outputs: metrics json with top face polygon and visible thickness

templates.projection: all furniture edges parallel to 2:1 tile grid
templates.alignment: desk, chair, computer, and actor fit within a complete normal 2x2 tile footprint; z-order leaves actor readable; chair and desk are generated as a matching set, not unrelated loose props; no cropped or missing corners

grid_contract.edge_join_policy: The 2x2 source tile must have complete joinable boundaries on all sides; do not generate a 1x1 desk and scale it up.

templates.style_notes: dark office furniture, monitor glow, no oversized desk hiding character; programmer monitors must face the worker and viewer correctly, never mirrored away

templates.projection: vertical wall planes sit on 1x1 or 2x1 tile back edge
templates.alignment: wall base line must match tile back edge angle
templates.style_notes: dark panel wall, glass partition, city-window hints; no fantasy stone or outdoor terrain

templates.projection: same 2:1 office view for every frame; no camera drift
templates.alignment: hands remain anchored over keyboard; fingers tap in alternating small movements; desk, chair, monitor, wrists, elbows, head, and hair stay stable except optional subtle breathing
templates.style_notes: transparent working loop webp/gif; no white edge around hair or hands; no arm pumping; no desk wobble; monitor glow may flicker subtly

templates.projection: same 2:1 office view for every frame
templates.alignment: walk path follows tile axes; hands and document remain visible
templates.style_notes: sequence: chairman gives instruction sheet, secretary takes it, returns to workstation typing, mail flies to CEO
